evidence.claim: Shipped RAG-based feature and owns the evaluation framework
evidence.source_text: Recently, I shipped our first RAG-based feature this year and now own the eval framework for it.

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% via learning-to-rank model
Evolved e-commerce search ranking from hand-tuned scoring to learning-to-rank model
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.

evidence.claim: Designed relevance labeling pipeline, feature pipeline, and training/eval workflow
evidence.source_text: Designed the relevance labeling pipeline (mix of click-through data and explicit human judgments), the feature pipeline, and the training/eval workflow.

evidence.claim: Proficient in a wide range of ML/NLP tools including Weaviate, LangChain, YOLO, PyTorch, Elasticsearch, and LlamaIndex
evidence.source_text: Skills: Weaviate (advanced), LangChain (expert), YOLO (intermediate), PyTorch (advanced), Elasticsearch (expert), LlamaIndex (expert), etc.
Deep Learning Specialization (Coursera/DeepLearning.AI, 2019); AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty (AWS, 2021)

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over theoretical knowledge
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Experienced in debugging production ranking issues
evidence.source_text: I've spent enough time debugging production ranking issues to know which signals matter and which are noise.
